cards.english: My name is Peppa

cards.jyutping: ji4 keoi5 zau6 hai6 ngo5 sai3 lou2
cards.english: And he is my little brother George

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E29 Pancakes［班戟］
cards.jyutping: keoi5 zau6 hai6 zyu1 taai3 taai2
cards.english: This is Mummy Pig

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E29 Pancakes［班戟］
cards.jyutping: keoi5 hai6 zyu1 sin1 saang1
cards.english: This is Daddy Pig

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E29 Pancakes［班戟］
cards.jyutping: ngo5 hai6
cards.english: I am Peppa

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E29 Pancakes［班戟］
cards.jyutping: baan1 kik1
cards.english: [Pancakes]

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E29 Pancakes［班戟］
cards.jyutping: ji4 gaa1 hai6 haa6 ng5 caa4 si4 gaan3
cards.english: It is afternoon tea time

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E29 Pancakes［班戟］
cards.characters: 豬太太有個驚喜畀大家
cards.jyutping: zyu1 taai3 taai2 jau5 go3 ging1 hei2 bei2 daai6 gaa1
cards.english: Mummy Pig has a surprise for everyone

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E29 Pancakes［班戟］
cards.characters: 今日係我哋嘅班戟日啊
cards.jyutping: gam1 jat6 hai6 ngo5 dei6 ge3 baan1 gik1 jat6 aa3
cards.english: Today is our pancake day

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E29 Pancakes［班戟］
cards.jyutping: baan1 kik1 hou2 mei6 aa3
cards.english: Pancakes, delicious!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E29 Pancakes［班戟］
cards.jyutping: ngo5 zung1 ji3 sik6 baan1 gik1
cards.english: I like to eat pancakes.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E29 Pancakes［班戟］
cards.jyutping: daai6 gaa1 dou1 zung1 ji3 sik6 baan1 gik1
cards.english: Everyone likes to eat pancakes.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E29 Pancakes［班戟］
cards.characters: 我係反轉班戟嘅專家嚟㗎，交畀我啦
cards.jyutping: ngo5 hai6 faan2 zyun3 baan1 kik1 ge3 zyun1 gaa1 lai4 gaa4 gaau1 bei2 ngo5 laa1
cards.english: I'm a pancake flipping expert, leave it to me!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E29 Pancakes［班戟］
cards.jyutping: nei5 hang2 ding6 mou5 man6 tai4
cards.english: Are you sure you're up to it?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E29 Pancakes［班戟］
cards.characters: 上次你將塊班戟拋咗落地
cards.jyutping: soeng6 ci3 nei5 zoeng1 faai3 baan1 kik1 paau1 zo2 lok6 dei6
cards.english: You dropped the pancake on the floor last time.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E29 Pancakes［班戟］
cards.characters: 結果搞到自己好忟憎喎
cards.jyutping: git3 gwo2 gaau2 dou3 zi6 gei2 hou2 man4 zang1 wo3
cards.english: And you ended up getting really annoyed!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E29 Pancakes［班戟］
cards.jyutping: ngo5 go2 ci3 gan1 bun2 zau6 mou5 man4 zang1
cards.english: I wasn't annoyed at all that time.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E29 Pancakes［班戟］
cards.characters: 嗰次係個平底鑊嘅問題啫
cards.jyutping: go2 ci3 hai6 go3 ping4 dai2 wok6 ge3 man6 tai4 ze1
cards.english: It was the pan's fault that time.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E29 Pancakes［班戟］
cards.characters: 媽咪，我哋都幫手整班戟吖，得嗎？
cards.jyutping: maa1 mi4 ngo5 dei6 dou1 bong1 sau2 zing2 baan1 kik1 aa1 dak1 maa1
cards.english: Mommy, can we help make the pancakes?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E29 Pancakes［班戟］
cards.characters: 好𡅅，你哋可以幫我手整粉漿
cards.jyutping: hou2 ngaak6 nei5 dei6 ho2 ji5 bong1 ngo5 sau2 zing2 fan2 zoeng1
cards.english: Okay, you guys can help me make the batter

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E29 Pancakes［班戟］
cards.characters: 首先，我倒啲麪粉落個碗度
cards.jyutping: sau2 sin1 ngo5 dou2 di1 min6 fan2 lok6 go3 wun2 dou6
cards.english: First, I'll pour some flour into the bowl

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E29 Pancakes［班戟］
cards.jyutping: ji4 gaa1 ngo5 daa2 zek3 daan2 lok6 heoi3
cards.english: Now I'll crack an egg in

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E29 Pancakes［班戟］
cards.jyutping: gan1 zyu6 gaa1 ngau4 naai5
cards.english: Then add milk

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E29 Pancakes［班戟］
cards.jyutping: jin4 hau6 zau6 gaau2 wan4 keoi5 dei6
cards.english: Then mix them all together

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E29 Pancakes［班戟］
cards.jyutping: maa1 mi4 bei2 ngo5 gaau2 aa1
cards.english: Mommy, let me stir!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E29 Pancakes［班戟］
cards.jyutping: hou2 aa1 gam2 nei5 bong1 ngo5 sau2 laa1
cards.english: Okay, then you can help me

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E29 Pancakes［班戟］
cards.jyutping: hou2 zung1 ji3 gaau2 bun6
cards.english: Peppa loves to stir

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E29 Pancakes［班戟］
cards.jyutping: dou1 soeng2 bong1 sau2 wo3
cards.english: George wants to help too

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E29 Pancakes［班戟］
cards.jyutping: m4 hai6 gam2 gaa4 jiu3 gam2 aa3
cards.english: That's not how it's done, it's like this

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E29 Pancakes［班戟］
cards.jyutping: hou2 laa1 nei5 dei6 m4 sai2 zoi3 gaau2 laa3
cards.english: Alright, you guys don't need to do this anymore.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E29 Pancakes［班戟］
cards.characters: 你哋坐定定，等我去煎班戟啦
cards.jyutping: nei5 dei6 co5 ding6 ding6 dang2 ngo5 heoi3 zin1 baan1 kik1 laa1
cards.english: You guys sit still, I'll go make pancakes.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E29 Pancakes［班戟］
cards.characters: 豬太太準備反轉塊班戟
cards.jyutping: zyu1 taai3 taai2 zeon2 bei6 faan2 zyun3 faai3 baan1 gik1
cards.english: Mrs. Pig is getting ready to flip the pancake.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E29 Pancakes［班戟］
cards.jyutping: hou2 je5
cards.english: Yay!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E29 Pancakes［班戟］
cards.characters: 你可以再拋高啲㗎，媽咪
cards.jyutping: nei5 ho2 ji5 zoi3 paau1 gou1 di1 gaa4 maa1 mi4
cards.english: You can flip it higher, Mommy.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E29 Pancakes［班戟］
cards.characters: 你一陣拋自己嗰塊班戟嗰陣
cards.jyutping: nei5 jat1 zan6 paau1 zi6 gei2 go2 faai3 baan1 kik1 go2 zan6
cards.english: When you flip your own pancake later,

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E29 Pancakes［班戟］
cards.jyutping: mai5 jau5 gei1 wui6 ho2 ji5 si6 faan6 lo1
cards.english: Then you'll have a chance to demonstrate.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E29 Pancakes［班戟］
cards.jyutping: dai6 jat1 faai3 baan1 kik1 hai6 ge3
cards.english: The first pancake is for George.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E29 Pancakes［班戟］
cards.characters: 豬太太幫George擳咗啲糖漿上去
cards.jyutping: zyu1 taai3 taai2 bong1 zit1 zo2 di1 tong4 zoeng1 soeng5 heoi3
cards.english: Mrs. Pig squeezed some syrup on it for George.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E29 Pancakes［班戟］
cards.jyutping: hou2 mei6 aa3
cards.english: Delicious!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E29 Pancakes［班戟］
cards.jyutping: ne1 faai3 baan1 gik1 hai6 ge3
cards.english: This pancake is Peppa's.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E29 Pancakes［班戟］
cards.jyutping: hou2 je5
cards.english: Yay!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E29 Pancakes［班戟］
cards.characters: 你應該再拋高啲啊，媽咪
cards.jyutping: nei5 jing1 goi1 zoi3 paau1 gou1 di1 aa3 maa1 mi4
cards.english: You should toss it higher, Mummy.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E29 Pancakes［班戟］
cards.jyutping: dou3 nei5 zin1 zi6 gei2 go2 faai3 go2 zan6
cards.english: When it's time for you to fry your own,

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E29 Pancakes［班戟］
cards.characters: 你咪有機會表演畀我哋睇下囖，爹哋
cards.jyutping: nei5 mai5 jau5 gei1 wui6 biu2 jin2 bei2 ngo5 dei6 tai2 haa6 lo1 de1 dei6
cards.english: You'll have a chance to show us, Daddy.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E29 Pancakes［班戟］
cards.jyutping: tong4 zoeng1 aa1 m4 goi1
cards.english: Syrup, please.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E29 Pancakes［班戟］
cards.jyutping: hou2 mei6 aa3
cards.english: Delicious.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E29 Pancakes［班戟］
cards.jyutping: ne1 faai3 baan1 gik1 hai6 zyu1 taai3 taai2 ge3
cards.english: This pancake is Mummy Pig's.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E29 Pancakes［班戟］
cards.jyutping: hou2 je5
cards.english: Yay!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E29 Pancakes［班戟］
cards.characters: 你都仲係拋得唔夠高啊，媽咪
cards.jyutping: nei5 dou1 zung6 hai6 paau1 dak1 m4 gau3 gou1 aa3 maa1 mi4
cards.english: You still aren't tossing it high enough, Mummy.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E29 Pancakes［班戟］
cards.characters: 下一塊班戟係你㗎，爹哋
cards.jyutping: haa6 jat1 faai3 baan1 gik1 hai6 nei5 gaa4 de1 dei6
cards.english: The next pancake is yours, Daddy.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E29 Pancakes［班戟］
cards.characters: 噉你就可以示範應該拋到幾高啦
cards.jyutping: gam2 nei5 zau6 ho2 ji5 si6 faan6 jing1 goi1 paau1 dou3 gei2 gou1 laa1
cards.english: Then you can demonstrate how high it should be tossed.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E29 Pancakes［班戟］
cards.jyutping: zan1 hai6 hou2 mei6 aa3
cards.english: It's really delicious.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E29 Pancakes［班戟］
cards.jyutping: daai6 gaa1 hai6 mai6 mong6 gan2 aa3
cards.english: Is everyone watching?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E29 Pancakes［班戟］
cards.characters: 想要煎一塊靚班戟嘅秘訣
cards.jyutping: soeng2 jiu3 zin1 jat1 faai3 leng3 baan1 kik1 ge3 bei3 kyut3
cards.english: Want the secret to making a perfect pancake?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E29 Pancakes［班戟］
cards.characters: 就係要將佢拋得夠高至得
cards.jyutping: zau6 hai6 jiu3 zoeng1 keoi5 paau1 dak1 gau3 gou1 zi3 dak1
cards.english: It's that you have to toss it high enough.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E29 Pancakes［班戟］
cards.jyutping: jat1 ji6 saam1
cards.english: One, two, three, toss!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E29 Pancakes［班戟］
cards.jyutping: de1 dei6 zan1 hai6 so4 aa3
cards.english: Daddy is really silly.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E29 Pancakes［班戟］
cards.jyutping: ngo5 nam2 ngo5 paau1 dak1 gou1 zo2 di1 aa3
cards.english: I think I tossed it a bit too high.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E29 Pancakes［班戟］
cards.characters: 太可惜喇，嗰塊係最後一塊㗎喇
cards.jyutping: taai3 ho2 sik1 laa3 go2 faai3 hai6 zeoi3 hau6 jat1 faai3 gaa4 laa3
cards.english: Too bad, that was the last one.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E29 Pancakes［班戟］
cards.characters: 要攞返佢落嚟應該好易嘅啫
cards.jyutping: jiu3 lo2 faan1 keoi5 lok6 lai4 jing1 goi1 hou2 ji6 ge3 ze1
cards.english: It should be easy enough to get it back down.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E29 Pancakes［班戟］
cards.jyutping: ai1 jaa3
cards.english: Oops...

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E29 Pancakes［班戟］
cards.characters: 弊喇，豬先生掂唔到塊班戟喎
cards.jyutping: bai6 laa3 zyu1 sin1 saang1 dim6 m4 dou3 faai3 baan1 kik1 wo3
cards.english: Oh no, Mr. Pig can't reach the pancake.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E29 Pancakes［班戟］
cards.jyutping: fong3 sam1 laa1 de1 dei6
cards.english: Don't worry, Daddy.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E29 Pancakes［班戟］
cards.characters: 我諗我知點樣拎返佢落嚟
cards.jyutping: ngo5 nam2 ngo5 zi1 dim2 joeng2 ling1 faan1 keoi5 lok6 lai4
cards.english: I think I know how to get it back down.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E29 Pancakes［班戟］
cards.jyutping: loeng5 go3 sai3 lou6 gan1 ngo5 soeng5 lau2 aa1
cards.english: You two kids, follow me upstairs.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E29 Pancakes［班戟］
cards.jyutping: gan1 ngo5 lai4 laa1
cards.english: Follow me.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E29 Pancakes［班戟］
cards.characters: 豬太太，到底想做啲咩呢？
cards.jyutping: zyu1 taai3 taai2 dou3 dai2 soeng2 zou6 di1 me1 ne1
cards.english: Mrs. Pig, what exactly are you planning to do?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E29 Pancakes［班戟］
cards.characters: 當我數到三個陣 我哋三個就一齊跳上跳落喇喎
cards.jyutping: dong1 ngo5 sou3 dou3 saam1 go3 zan6 ngo5 dei6 saam1 go3 zau6 jat1 cai4 tiu3 soeng5 tiu3 lok6 laa3 wo3
cards.english: When I count to three, the three of us will jump up and down together.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E29 Pancakes［班戟］
cards.jyutping: jat1 ji6 saam1 tiu3
cards.english: One, two, three, jump!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E29 Pancakes［班戟］
cards.jyutping: keoi5 dei6 hai2 soeng6 min6 zou6 gan2 me1 ne1
cards.english: What are they doing up there?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E29 Pancakes［班戟］
cards.jyutping: sing4 gung1 laa3
cards.english: Success!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E29 Pancakes［班戟］
cards.jyutping: zyu1 sin1 saang1 jau5 baan1 gik1 sik6 laa3
cards.english: Mr. Pig has pancakes to eat now!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E29 Pancakes［班戟］
cards.characters: 爹哋頭上面有塊班戟啊
cards.jyutping: de1 dei6 tau4 soeng6 min6 jau5 faai3 baan1 kik1 aa3
cards.english: There's a pancake on Daddy's head!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E29 Pancakes［班戟］
cards.characters: 要唔要加啲糖漿啊，爹哋？
cards.jyutping: jiu3 m4 jiu3 gaa1 di1 tong4 zoeng1 aa3 de1 dei6
cards.english: Do you want some syrup, Daddy?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E29 Pancakes［班戟］
cards.jyutping: hou2 aa1 m4 goi1
cards.english: Okay, thanks.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E29 Pancakes［班戟］
cards.jyutping: jat1 ji6 saam1
cards.english: One, two, three, flop!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E29 Pancakes［班戟］
cards.jyutping: zan1 hai6 hou2 mei6 aa3
cards.english: It's really delicious!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E29 Pancakes［班戟］
cards.jyutping: de1 di4 hou2 so4 aa3
cards.english: Daddy is so silly!
